name: Flit
description: Moths at dusk, wings flapping in mirrored pairs — every redraw catches them at a different beat of the wing.

code.style: --rule: ( /* both wings mirror one emitted flap angle and share color and outer radius */ --wing: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --flap: @r(-14, 20); --wr: @r(40, 70); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 16%; top: 28%; width: 32%; height: 44%; background: @var(--wing); border-radius: calc(@var(--wr) * 1%) 12% 60% 40% / 60% 30% 70% 40%; transform: rotate(calc(@var(--flap) * 1deg)); transform-origin: 100% 50%; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 52%; top: 28%; width: 32%; height: 44%; background: @var(--wing); border-radius: 12% calc(@var(--wr) * 1%) 40% 60% / 30% 60% 40% 70%; transform: rotate(calc(@var(--flap) * -1deg)); transform-origin: 0% 50%; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
